questions.q: Making viral news around May 18, 2026, researchers stunned the literary world by finding the oldest surviving English poem hidden inside a medieval Latin book at Rome's National Central Library. What is the name of this 7th-century poem?
Highlighted by LAist in May 2026, which tiny independent Los Angeles bookstore transforms its 900-square-foot space into a lively "Sunday Funday Market" every week?
On May 18, 2026, publisher Pan Fiction announced an "industry-first" book advent calendar targeted at romance readers. What is the title of this 12-novella collection?
On May 18, 2026, it was announced that author Steven James would be the keynote speaker for an annual Professional Writer's Conference held at which university?
